user.title: Configure Valhalla Connection
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Valhalla routing engine instance.

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Valhalla instance (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or valhalla.local)
data_description.port: The port Valhalla is listening on (default: 8002)
data_description.ssl: Enable if your Valhalla instance is served over HTTPS

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Valhalla. Check the hostname, port, and SSL setting, and that the instance is running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check your Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: A Valhalla instance is already configured. Only one connection is supported.
